productDisplayName: Spalding Men's Yellow And Green With Graphic Flip Flop
description: CompositionYellow and green slippers with rubber insole and graphic, EVA midsole and TPR outsole, double layer strap with embroidered logo and twill tape toe separatorsshoe care1. Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washEnjoy summer in this energetic pair of yellow flip flops from spalding. The " True to the game" graphic byline on the insole is the very essence of the brand. The yellow insole is soft and the green EVA midsole makes the footwear lightweight and cushioned. The wide straps ensure a snug Fit and the twill tape toe separators give added comfort. The TPR outsole with the honeycomb pattern and circular logo seal enhances grip and stability
